messages.content: What is the Chinese word for "cracker"?
The Chinese word for "cracker" is 饼干 (bǐng gān).
What is the Korean word for "bird"?
The Korean word for "bird" is 새 (sae).
What is the Korean "baseball"?
The Korean word for "baseball" is 야구 (yagu).
What is the Korean word for "camera"?
The Korean word for "camera" is 카메라 (kamera).
How do you write the name "Daniel" in Hangul? Spell it out phonetically?
To write the name "Daniel" in Hangul, it would be spelled as 다니엘 (Da-ni-el) phonetically.
How is "Daniel" transcribed in Phoenician characters?
The name "Daniel" can be transcribed phonetically into Phoenician characters as דניאל.
How is "Tara" transcribed in Hangul?
The name "Tara" can be transcribed in Hangul as 타라.
"Ken"
The name "Ken" can be transcribed in Hangul as 켄.
"Michael"
The name "Michael" can be transcribed in Hangul as 마이클.
"Zeebo"

The name "Zeebo" does not have a direct Korean equivalent or pronunciation, as it is not a common name in Korean culture. However, if you want to transcribe it phonetically in Hangul, you can use 지보 (Ji-bo).
"Vera"
The name "Vera" can be transcribed in Hangul as 베라.
"Tani-chan"
The name "Tani-chan" can be transcribed in Hangul as 타니챈.
"Pongo"
The name "Pongo" can be transcribed in Hangul as 폰고.
"Mononykus"
The name "Mononykus" can be transcribed in Hangul as 모노니쿠스.
